    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J K L M N O P R S T U V W X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    D

    damage - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Raw damage dealt on collision before defense reduction.
    Damageable - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Contract for entities that can receive and process incoming damage.
    DEAD - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.PlayerState
    Defeated/dead state.
    DEATH - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.TarotType
    High-risk high-reward card with heavy damage and self-damage.
    def - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Defense used in incoming damage reduction.
    DEFAULT_HEIGHT - Static variable in class application.SceneHandler
    Default scene height in pixels.
    DEFAULT_WIDTH - Static variable in class application.SceneHandler
    Default scene width in pixels.
    directionX - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Normalized or signed X direction.
    directionY - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Normalized or signed Y direction.
    DONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SelectState
    Both players locked in; selection is complete.
    draw(Color) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Paints this pane with a solid background color.
    draw(Color) - Method in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Applies a solid background color to the status bar.
